backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, product listings with categories, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed branding updates: changing application name from 'Local Marketplace' to 'Resoult' in HTML title and navigation header.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the Resoult marketplace application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with orange/amber gradient theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Resoult' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for browse and add-product pages wrapped in shared layout with profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component displaying buttons to filter products by category or show all, with loading state and orange/amber gradient styling for selected category.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright for LocalMarket and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing consistent navigation header and footer structure around page content.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Header navigation with 'Resoult' branding, Store icon, authentication controls, and conditional 'Sell Item' button for logged-in users.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product title, description, price in dollars, and category badge with orange-themed hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating product listings with validation for title, description, price, and category selection using backend categories.
frontend/src/components/ProductGrid.tsx: Responsive grid layout component rendering an array of ProductCard components in 1-3 columns based on screen size.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name. Prevents closing until profile is created and uses form validation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Creates AuthClient with configurable options and manages identity state throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including categories, products, and user profiles. Handles query invalidation and actor availability checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for theming including light/dark mode color schemes. Defines design tokens for colors, borders, and component styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers. Renders the root App component with necessary context wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AddProductPage.tsx: Protected page for authenticated users to list new products. Redirects unauthenticated users to home and renders ProductForm component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Main browsing page displaying products with category filtering. Shows loading states and handles both all-products and category-filtered views.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing. Provides session storage persistence and parameter cleanup functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including color schemes using OKLCH format, typography with Inter font, container settings, border radius variables, and custom animations for accordions and sidebars.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a mobile marketplace app called 'Resoult' with existing features for product listings, categories, and browse/search, plus pending feature requests for auctions, location-based proximity, and UI improvements.
